cot_prefix: Okay, so I need to analyze this ethical dilemma where a parent is at a movie theater with their kids, and during the previews, an R-rated movie is shown, making the kids uncomfortable. The parent has to decide whether to leave immediately (risking missing the movie) or stay and possibly expose the kids to more mature content. Let me break this down. First, I should consider the ethical principles involved. Maybe things like the well-being of the children, parental responsibility, honesty with kids about media content, and even the value of the movie experience.
